name: Easy Pot-au-Feu
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat cubes in the butter for a short time; add onions and leeks and sauté briefly. Place all ingredients in the casserole dish.
2. Add the carrots and broth, season with salt and pepper. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Add the chopped vegetables and simmer for another 30 minutes.
